title: Karnx's Miscs
description:
Karnx's Miscs
A collection of miscellaneous swords with unique abilities, perfect for spicing up your Minecraft experience!

Fabric, Minecraft version 1.21
body:
# **Karnx's Miscs!**
### A Sword Mod with Endless Possibilities

Karnx's Miscs is a Minecraft mod that introduces over 15 unique and exciting swords, each with its own abilities and features. Perfect for players who love to spice up combat and exploration!

## 1. **Swords Included-**
> - Confident Sword
> - Dagger
> - Eclipse Sword
> - Ender Sword
> - Frozen Sword
> - Gravity Sword
> - Hammer Item
> - Katana Sword
> - Lucky Sword
> - Machine Gun
> - Magnet Sword
> - Necro Sword
> - Phantom Sword
> - Phoenix Sword
> - Quick Sword
> - Shadow Sword
> - Soul Sword
> - TNT Sword
> - Tomahawk Item
> - Volcanic Sword
## 1. **Tools**
> - Chisel Item
Each weapon and tool brings a unique playstyle and utility to your game, offering endless fun and creativity!

Download now and explore the world of Karnx's Miscs!
Mod Items-[https://drive.google.com/file/d/14DSV2Hb4i7X3X9nbE2VEw26MjOHTS1kB/view?usp=sharing]
